Desc_RailroadTrack_C.name: Railway
Desc_RailroadTrack_C.description:
Carries trains reliably and quickly.
Has a wide turn angle, so make sure to plan it out properly.

Desc_Beam_C.name: Metal Beam
Desc_Beam_C.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

Desc_Beam_Painted_C.name: Painted Beam
Desc_Beam_Painted_C.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

Desc_Beam_Cable_C.name: Braided Cable
Desc_Beam_Cable_C.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

Desc_Beam_Cable_Cluster_C.name: Braided Cable Cluster
Desc_Beam_Cable_Cluster_C.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

Desc_Beam_Concrete_C.name: Round Concrete Beam (Concrete)
Desc_Beam_Concrete_C.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

Desc_Beam_H_C.name: H-Beam
Desc_Beam_H_C.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

Desc_Beam_Shelf_C.name: Shelf Beam
Desc_Beam_Shelf_C.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

Desc_TradingPost_C.name: The HUB
Desc_TradingPost_C.description: The heart of your factory. This is where you complete FICSIT milestones to unlock additional schematics for buildings, vehicles, parts, equipment, etc.

Desc_WorkBench_C.name: Crafting Bench
Desc_WorkBench_C.description:
Allows you to manually craft a wide range of different parts.
These parts can then be used to construct various factory buildings, vehicles, and equipment.

Desc_ConveyorCeilingAttachment_C.name: Conveyor Ceiling Mount
Desc_ConveyorCeilingAttachment_C.description:
Attaches to ceilings and other ceiling mounts.
Useful for routing Conveyor Belts more precisely and over long distances.

Desc_ConveyorPole_C.name: Conveyor Pole
Desc_ConveyorPole_C.description:
Connects Conveyor Belt segments. Pole height can be adjusted.
Useful for routing Conveyor Belts more precisely and across long distances.

Desc_ConveyorPoleWall_C.name: Conveyor Wall Mount
Desc_ConveyorPoleWall_C.description:
Attaches to Walls.
Useful for routing Conveyor Belts more precisely and over long distances.

Desc_ConveyorBeltMk1_C.name: Conveyor Belt Mk.1
Desc_ConveyorBeltMk1_C.description: Transports up to 60 resources per minute. Used to move resources between buildings.

Desc_PowerLine_C.name: Power Line
Desc_PowerLine_C.description: Connects Power Poles, Power Generators, and factory buildings.

Desc_PowerPoleMk1_C.name: Power Pole Mk.1
Desc_PowerPoleMk1_C.description:
Allows for up to 4 Power Line connections.
Connect Power Poles, Power Generators, and factory buildings with Power Lines to create a power grid. The power grid supplies all connected buildings with power.

Desc_PowerPoleWall_C.name: Wall Outlet Mk.1
Desc_PowerPoleWall_C.description:
Functions like a Power Pole, but attaches to a wall.
Allows for up to 4 Power Line connections.
Connect Power Poles, Power Generators and factory buildings with Power Lines to create a power grid. The power grid supplies all connected buildings with power.

Desc_GeneratorCoal_C.name: Coal-Powered Generator
Desc_GeneratorCoal_C.description:
Burns Coal to boil Water. The steam produced rotates turbines that generate electricity for the power grid.
Has Conveyor Belt and Pipeline input ports that allow the Coal and Water supply to be automated.
Caution: Always generates power at the set clock speed. Shuts down if fuel requirements are not met.

Desc_PipelineSupport_C.name: Pipeline Support
Desc_PipelineSupport_C.description:
Connects Pipeline segments. Support height can be adjusted.
Useful for routing Pipelines more precisely and across long distances.

Desc_PipelineSupportWall_C.name: Pipeline Wall Support
Desc_PipelineSupportWall_C.description:
Attaches to Walls.
Used to connect Pipelines over longer distances.

Desc_Pipeline_C.name: Pipeline Mk.1
Desc_Pipeline_C.description:
Transports fluids.
External indicators show flow rate, direction, and volume.
Capacity: 300m³ of fluid per minute.

Desc_PipelineJunction_Cross_C.name: Pipeline Junction
Desc_PipelineJunction_Cross_C.description: Attaches to a Pipeline, allowing it to be split up to 4 ways.

Desc_PipelinePump_C.name: Pipeline Pump Mk.1
Desc_PipelinePump_C.description:
Can be attached to a Pipeline to apply Head Lift.
Maximum Head Lift: 20m
(Allows fluids to be transported 20meters upwards.)
NOTE: Arrows and holograms when building indicate Head Lift direction.
NOTE: Head Lift does not stack, so space between Pumps is recommended.

Desc_PipeStorageTank_C.name: Fluid Buffer
Desc_PipeStorageTank_C.description:
Holds up to 400m³ of fluid.
Has Pipeline input and output ports.

Desc_WaterPump_C.name: Water Extractor
Desc_WaterPump_C.description:
Extracts water from the body of water it is built on.
Note: the water needs to be sufficiently deep, and rivers are generally not deep enough.
Default Extraction Rate: 120m³ of water per minute.
Head Lift: 10m
(Allows fluids to be transported 10meters upwards.)

Desc_ResourceSink_C.name: AWESOME Sink
Desc_ResourceSink_C.description:
Got excess resources? Fear not, for FICSIT does not waste! The newly developed AWESOME Sink turns any and all useful parts into research data just as fast as you can supply them!
Participating pioneers will be compensated with Coupons that can be spent at the AWESOME Shop.

Desc_ResourceSinkShop_C.name: AWESOME Shop
Desc_ResourceSinkShop_C.description:
Redeem your FICSIT Coupons here!
For those employees going the extra kilometer we have set aside special bonus milestones and rewards! Get your Coupons in the AWESOME Sink program now!
*No refunds possible.

Desc_QuantumEncoder_C.name: Quantum Encoder
Desc_QuantumEncoder_C.description:
The Quantum Encoder uses Excited Photonic Matter to produce the most complex of parts, controlling development up to the quantum level.
Warning: Power usage is extremely high and unstable.

Desc_Converter_C.name: Converter
Desc_Converter_C.description:
The Converter harnesses Reanimated SAM to enable precise matter and energy transmutation.
Warning: Power usage is very high and unstable.

Desc_OilPump_C.name: Oil Extractor
Desc_OilPump_C.description:
Extracts Crude Oil when built on an oil node. Extraction rates vary based on node purity.
Default Extraction Rate: 120m³ of oil per minute.
Head Lift: 10m
(Allows fluids to be transported 10meters upwards.)

Desc_OilRefinery_C.name: Refinery
Desc_OilRefinery_C.description:
Refines fluid and/or solid parts into other parts.
Head Lift: 10m
(Allows fluids to be transported 10meters upwards.)
Has both Conveyor Belt and Pipeline input and output ports so that a wide range of recipes can be automated.

Desc_Valve_C.name: Valve
Desc_Valve_C.description:
Limits Pipeline flow rates.
Can be attached to a Pipeline.
NOTE: Has an in- and output direction.

Desc_FoundryMk1_C.name: Foundry
Desc_FoundryMk1_C.description:
Smelts 2 resources into alloy ingots.
Can be automated by feeding ore in via Conveyor Belts connected to the input ports. The resulting ingots can be automatically extracted by connecting a Conveyor Belt to the output port.

Desc_Packager_C.name: Packager
Desc_Packager_C.description:
Packages and unpackages fluids.
Head Lift: 10m
(Allows fluids to be transported 10meters upwards.)
Has both Conveyor Belt and Pipeline input and output ports so that a wide range of recipes can be automated.

Desc_MinerMk2_C.name: Miner Mk.2
Desc_MinerMk2_C.description:
Extracts solid resources from the resource node it is built on.
Default extraction rate is 120 resources per minute.
Extraction rate varies based on resource node purity. Outputs all extracted resources onto connected Conveyor Belts.

Desc_ManufacturerMk1_C.name: Manufacturer
Desc_ManufacturerMk1_C.description:
Crafts 3 or 4 parts into another part.
Can be automated by feeding component parts in via Conveyor Belts connected to the input ports. The resulting parts can be automatically extracted by connecting a Conveyor Belt to the output port.

Desc_AssemblerMk1_C.name: Assembler
Desc_AssemblerMk1_C.description:
Crafts 2 parts into another part.
Can be automated by feeding component parts in via Conveyor Belts connected to the input ports. The resulting parts can be automatically extracted by connecting a Conveyor Belt to the output port.

Desc_HadronCollider_C.name: Particle Accelerator
Desc_HadronCollider_C.description:
Uses electromagnetic fields to propel particles to very high speeds and energies. The specific design allows for a variety of processes, including matter generation and conversion.
Warning: Power usage is extremely high and unstable, and varies per recipe.

Desc_Blender_C.name: Blender
Desc_Blender_C.description:
Blends fluids together or combines them with solid parts in a wide variety of processes.
Head Lift: 10m
(Allows fluids to be transported 10meters upwards.)
Has both Conveyor Belt and Pipeline input and output ports.

Desc_GeneratorNuclear_C.name: Nuclear Power Plant
Desc_GeneratorNuclear_C.description:
Consumes Nuclear Fuel Rods and Water to produce electricity for the power grid.
Produces Nuclear Waste, which is extracted via the Conveyor Belt output.
Caution: Always generates power at the set clock speed. Shuts down if fuel requirements are not met.

Desc_FrackingExtractor_C.name: Resource Well Extractor
Desc_FrackingExtractor_C.description:
Collects pressurized resources when placed on the activated sub-nodes of a Resource Well. Does not require power.
Default Extraction Rate: 60m³ of fluid per minute.
Head Lift: 10m
(Allows fluids to be transported 10meters upwards.)

Desc_FrackingSmasher_C.name: Resource Well Pressurizer
Desc_FrackingSmasher_C.description:
Activates a Resource Well by pressurizing the underground resource. Must be placed on a Resource Well.
Once activated, Resource Well Extractors can be placed on the surrounding sub-nodes to extract the resource.
Requires power. Overclocking increases the output potential of the entire Resource Well.

Desc_DroneStation_C.name: Drone Port
Desc_DroneStation_C.description:
Functions as home Port to a single Drone, which transports available input back and forth between its home Port and destination Port.
Drone Ports can have one other Port assigned as their transport destination.
The Drone Port interface provides delivery details and allows management of Port connections.

Desc_ConveyorBeltMk5_C.name: Conveyor Belt Mk.5
Desc_ConveyorBeltMk5_C.description: Transports up to 780 resources per minute. Used to move resources between buildings.

Desc_ConveyorLiftMk5_C.name: Conveyor Lift Mk.5
Desc_ConveyorLiftMk5_C.description: Transports up to 780 resources per minute. Used to move resources between floors.

Desc_MinerMk3_C.name: Miner Mk.3
Desc_MinerMk3_C.description:
Extracts solid resources from the resource node it is built on.
Default extraction rate is 240 resources per minute.
Extraction rate varies based on resource node purity. Outputs all extracted resources onto connected Conveyor Belts.

Desc_ConveyorBeltMk6_C.name: Conveyor Belt Mk.6
Desc_ConveyorBeltMk6_C.description: Transports up to 1200 resources per minute. Used to move resources between buildings.

Desc_ConveyorLiftMk6_C.name: Conveyor Lift Mk.6
Desc_ConveyorLiftMk6_C.description: Transports up to 1200 resources per minute. Used to move resources between floors.

Desc_Portal_C.name: Main Portal
Desc_Portal_C.description:
Enables pioneer teleportation between two linked Portals.
Each Portal can only have a single link.
A link can only be made between a Main and Satellite Portal.
Singularity Cells need to be supplied to the Main Portal and will be consumed to establish and maintain the Portal link.
WARNINGS:
- Massive power draw will occur during start-up and usage.
- Power draw on use increases with travel distance.
- Link start-up will take time. Letting the connection expire is not recommended.
- Failure to deliver sufficient Singularity Cells will cause the link to expire.
- FICSIT does not condone the use of wormhole technology. Any usage of wormhole technology is at the user's own risk.

Desc_PortalSatellite_C.name: Satellite Portal
Desc_PortalSatellite_C.description:
Enables pioneer teleportation between two linked Portals.
Each Portal can only have a single link.
A link can only be made between a Main and Satellite Portal.
Singularity Cells need to be supplied to the Main Portal and will be consumed to establish and maintain the Portal link.
WARNINGS:
- Massive power draw will occur during start-up and usage.
- Power draw on use increases with travel distance.
- Link start-up will take time. Letting the connection expire is not recommended.
- Failure to deliver sufficient Singularity Cells will cause the link to expire.
- FICSIT does not condone the use of wormhole technology. Any usage of wormhole technology is at the user's own risk.

Desc_BlueprintDesigner_MK3_C.name: Blueprint Designer Mk.3
Desc_BlueprintDesigner_MK3_C.description:
The Blueprint Designer is used to create custom factory designs and save them as Blueprints.
Blueprints can be accessed from the Blueprint tab of the Build Menu.
Note that buildings can only be placed in the Blueprint Designer if they are fully within the boundary frame.
Dimensions: 48m x 48m x 48m

Desc_RailroadBlockSignal_C.name: Block Signal
Desc_RailroadBlockSignal_C.description:
Directs the movement of trains to avoid collisions and bottlenecks.
Block Signals can be placed on Railways to create 'Blocks' between them. When a train is occupying one of these Blocks, other trains will be unable to enter it.
Caution: Signals are directional! Trains are unable to move against this direction, so be sure to set up Signals in both directions for bi-directional Railways.

Desc_RailroadPathSignal_C.name: Path Signal
Desc_RailroadPathSignal_C.description:
Directs the movement of trains to avoid collisions and bottlenecks.
Path Signals are advanced signals that are especially useful for bi-directional Railways and complex intersections. They function similarly to Block Signals, but rather than occupying the entire Block, trains can reserve a specific path through it and will only enter the Block if their path allows them to fully pass through.
Caution: Signals are directional! Trains are unable to move against this direction, so be sure to set up Signals in both directions for bi-directional Railways.

Desc_BlueprintDesigner_MK2_C.name: Blueprint Designer Mk.2
Desc_BlueprintDesigner_MK2_C.description:
The Blueprint Designer is used to create custom factory designs and save them as Blueprints.
Blueprints can be accessed from the Blueprint tab of the Build Menu.
Note that buildings can only be placed in the Blueprint Designer if they are fully within the boundary frame.
Dimensions: 40m x 40m x 40m

Desc_PipelineMK2_C.name: Pipeline Mk.2
Desc_PipelineMK2_C.description:
Transports fluids.
External indicators show flow rate, direction, and volume.
Capacity: 600m³ of fluid per minute.

Desc_PipelinePumpMk2_C.name: Pipeline Pump Mk.2
Desc_PipelinePumpMk2_C.description:
Can be attached to a Pipeline to apply Head Lift.
Maximum Head Lift: 50m
(Allows fluids to be transported 50meters upwards.)
NOTE: Arrows and holograms when building indicate Head Lift direction.
NOTE: Head Lift does not stack, so space between Pumps is recommended.

Desc_RailroadEndStop_C.name: Buffer Stop
Desc_RailroadEndStop_C.description:
Prevents trains from derailing at the end of a railway.
While automated driving systems have made Buffer Stops mostly obsolete, their use is still recommended to mitigate potential human error.

Desc_TrainDockingStation_C.name: Freight Platform
Desc_TrainDockingStation_C.description:
Loads and unloads Freight Cars that stop at the Freight Platform.
Loading and unloading options can be set by configuring the building.
Snaps to other Platforms and Stations.
Needs to be connected to a powered Railway to function.

Desc_TrainDockingStationLiquid_C.name: Fluid Freight Platform
Desc_TrainDockingStationLiquid_C.description:
Loads and unloads Freight Cars that stop at the Freight Platform.
Loading and unloading options can be set by configuring the building.
Snaps to other Platforms and Stations.
Needs to be connected to a powered Railway to function.

Desc_TrainStation_C.name: Train Station
Desc_TrainStation_C.description:
Serves as a hub for Locomotives, which can be set to navigate to and stop at a Train Station.
You can connect power to a Train Station to power up the trains on the Railway as well as feed power to other stations.

Desc_ConveyorBeltMk4_C.name: Conveyor Belt Mk.4
Desc_ConveyorBeltMk4_C.description: Transports up to 480 resources per minute. Used to move resources between buildings.

Desc_ConveyorLiftMk4_C.name: Conveyor Lift Mk.4
Desc_ConveyorLiftMk4_C.description: Transports up to 480 resources per minute. Used to move resources between floors.

Desc_GeneratorFuel_C.name: Fuel-Powered Generator
Desc_GeneratorFuel_C.description:
Consumes Fuel to generate electricity for the power grid.
Has a Pipeline input port that allows the Fuel supply to be automated.
Caution: Always generates power at the set clock speed. Shuts down if fuel requirements are not met.

Desc_IndustrialTank_C.name: Industrial Fluid Buffer
Desc_IndustrialTank_C.description:
Holds up to 2400m³ of fluid.
Has Pipeline input and output ports.

Desc_ConveyorBeltMk3_C.name: Conveyor Belt Mk.3
Desc_ConveyorBeltMk3_C.description: Transports up to 270 resources per minute. Used to move resources between buildings.

Desc_ConveyorLiftMk3_C.name: Conveyor Lift Mk.3
Desc_ConveyorLiftMk3_C.description: Transports up to 270 resources per minute. Used to move resources between floors.

Desc_PipeSupportStackable_C.name: Stackable Pipeline Support
Desc_PipeSupportStackable_C.description: Supports Pipelines. Can be stacked on other stackable supports.

Desc_StorageContainerMk2_C.name: Industrial Storage Container
Desc_StorageContainerMk2_C.description:
Contains 48 slots for storing large amounts of items.
Has 2 Conveyor Belt input ports and 2 Conveyor Belt output ports.

Desc_BlueprintDesigner_C.name: Blueprint Designer Mk.1
Desc_BlueprintDesigner_C.description:
The Blueprint Designer is used to create custom factory designs and save them as Blueprints.
Blueprints can be accessed from the Blueprint tab of the Build Menu.
Note that buildings can only be placed in the Blueprint Designer if they are fully within the boundary frame.
Dimensions: 32m x 32m x 32m

Desc_PipeHyperStart_C.name: Hypertube Entrance
Desc_PipeHyperStart_C.description: Powers up a Hypertube system and allows it to be entered.

Desc_HyperPoleStackable_C.name: Stackable Hypertube Support
Desc_HyperPoleStackable_C.description: Supports Hypertubes. Can be stacked on other stackable supports.

Desc_HyperTubeJunction_C.name: Hypertube Junction
Desc_HyperTubeJunction_C.description:
A three-way Hypertube Junction that allows travel to and from any of its directions.
Can be built on its own or attached to a Hypertube Support or Junction.

Desc_HypertubeTJunction_C.name: Hypertube Branch
Desc_HypertubeTJunction_C.description:
A one-way Hypertube Branch that allows another Hypertube to split off from an existing path. The branching Hypertube can only be accessed when entering from the longer side.
Can be built on its own, onto an existing Hypertube, or attached to a Hypertube Support or Junction.

Desc_HyperTubeWallSupport_C.name: Hypertube Wall Support
Desc_HyperTubeWallSupport_C.description:
Attaches to Walls.
Supports Hypertubes, allowing them to stretch over longer distances.

Desc_PipeHyperSupport_C.name: Hypertube Support
Desc_PipeHyperSupport_C.description: Supports Hypertubes, allowing them to stretch over longer distances.

Desc_PipeHyper_C.name: Hypertube
Desc_PipeHyper_C.description:
Transports FICSIT employees.
A Hypertube system cannot be powered up or used until a Hypertube Entrance is attached.

Desc_PowerStorageMk1_C.name: Power Storage
Desc_PowerStorageMk1_C.description:
Connects to a power grid to store excess power produced. The stored power can be harnessed if power grid consumption exceeds production.
Storage Capacity: 100 MWh (100 MW for 1 hour)
Maximum Charge Rate: 100 MW
Maximum Discharge Rate: Unlimited

Desc_PowerTower_C.name: Power Tower
Desc_PowerTower_C.description:
Helps span Power Lines across greater distances.
There is an additional power connector at the bottom of the Power Tower to connect it to other buildings, such as Power Poles.

Desc_PowerTowerPlatform_C.name: Power Tower Platform
Desc_PowerTowerPlatform_C.description:
Helps span Power Lines across greater distances.
There is an additional power connector at the bottom of the Power Tower to connect it to other buildings, such as Power Poles.
Note: This Power Tower variant includes a ladder and platform for improved utility.

Desc_TruckStation_C.name: Truck Station
Desc_TruckStation_C.description:
Sends or receives resources to/from vehicles.
Has 48 inventory slots.
Transfers up to 120 stacks per minute to/from docked vehicles.
Always refuels vehicles if it has access to a matching fuel type.

Desc_ConveyorBeltMk2_C.name: Conveyor Belt Mk.2
Desc_ConveyorBeltMk2_C.description: Transports up to 120 resources per minute. Used to move resources between buildings.

Desc_ConveyorLiftMk2_C.name: Conveyor Lift Mk.2
Desc_ConveyorLiftMk2_C.description: Transports up to 120 resources per minute. Used to move resources between floors.

Desc_ConveyorPoleStackable_C.name: Stackable Conveyor Pole
Desc_ConveyorPoleStackable_C.description: Supports Conveyor Belts. Can be stacked on other stackable supports.

Desc_JumpPadAdjustable_C.name: Jump Pad
Desc_JumpPadAdjustable_C.description:
Launches pioneers for quick, vertical traversal.
The launch angle can be adjusted while building.
Caution: Be sure to land safely!

Desc_LandingPad_C.name: U-Jelly Landing Pad
Desc_LandingPad_C.description:
Generates a speed-dampening jelly.
Guarantees a safe landing.

Desc_Mam_C.name: MAM
Desc_Mam_C.description:
The Molecular Analysis Machine is used to analyze new and exotic materials found on alien planets.
Through the MAM, R&D will assist pioneers in turning any valuable data into usable research options and new technologies.

Desc_StoragePlayer_C.name: Personal Storage Box
Desc_StoragePlayer_C.description: Contains 25 slots for storing large amounts of items.

Desc_ConveyorAttachmentMerger_C.name: Conveyor Merger
Desc_ConveyorAttachmentMerger_C.description: Merges up to three Conveyor Belts into one.

Desc_ConveyorAttachmentSplitter_C.name: Conveyor Splitter
Desc_ConveyorAttachmentSplitter_C.description:
Splits one Conveyor Belt into two or three.
Useful for diverting parts and resources away from backlogged Conveyor Belts.

Desc_ConveyorLiftMk1_C.name: Conveyor Lift Mk.1
Desc_ConveyorLiftMk1_C.description: Transports up to 60 resources per minute. Used to move resources between floors.

Desc_Foundation_8x1_01_C.name: Foundation (1m)
Desc_Foundation_8x1_01_C.description:
Provides a flat floor to build your factory on.
Buildings on top of the Foundation snap to a grid, making it easier to line them up with each other.
Size: 8m x 1m

Desc_Foundation_8x2_01_C.name: Foundation (2m)
Desc_Foundation_8x2_01_C.description:
Provides a flat floor to build your factory on.
Buildings on top of the Foundation snap to a grid, making it easier to line them up with each other.
Size: 8m x 2m

Desc_Foundation_8x4_01_C.name: Foundation (4m)
Desc_Foundation_8x4_01_C.description:
Provides a flat floor to build your factory on.
Buildings on top of the Foundation snap to a grid, making it easier to line them up with each other.
Size: 8m x 4m

Desc_QuarterPipe_C.name: Quarter Pipe
Desc_QuarterPipe_C.description:
Provides an optional factory look that is smoother and offers possibilities for recreational activities.
Still utilizes the standard Foundation building grid for improved building placement.
Size: 8m x 4m

Desc_QuarterPipe_02_C.name: Inverted Quarter Pipe
Desc_QuarterPipe_02_C.description:
Provides an optional factory look that is smoother and offers possibilities for recreational activities.
Still utilizes the standard Foundation building grid for improved building placement.
Size: 8m x 4m

Desc_QuarterPipeCorner_01_C.name: Inner Corner Quarter Pipe
Desc_QuarterPipeCorner_01_C.description:
Provides an optional factory look that is smoother and offers possibilities for recreational activities.
Still utilizes the standard Foundation building grid for improved building placement.
Size: 8m x 4m

Desc_QuarterPipeCorner_02_C.name: Inverted Inner Corner Quarter Pipe
Desc_QuarterPipeCorner_02_C.description:
Provides an optional factory look that is smoother and offers possibilities for recreational activities.
Still utilizes the standard Foundation building grid for improved building placement.
Size: 8m x 4m

Desc_QuarterPipeCorner_03_C.name: Outer Corner Quarter Pipe
Desc_QuarterPipeCorner_03_C.description:
Provides an optional factory look that is smoother and offers possibilities for recreational activities.
Still utilizes the standard Foundation building grid for improved building placement.
Size: 8m x 4m

Desc_QuarterPipeCorner_04_C.name: Inverted Outer Corner Quarter Pipe
Desc_QuarterPipeCorner_04_C.description:
Provides an optional factory look that is smoother and offers possibilities for recreational activities.
Still utilizes the standard Foundation building grid for improved building placement.
Size: 8m x 4m

Desc_Ramp_8x1_01_C.name: Ramp (1m)
Desc_Ramp_8x1_01_C.description:
Snaps to Foundations and makes it easier to get onto them.
Buildings on top of the Ramp snap to a grid, making it easier to line them up with each other.
Size: 8m x 1m

Desc_Ramp_8x2_01_C.name: Ramp (2m)
Desc_Ramp_8x2_01_C.description:
Snaps to Foundations and makes it easier to get onto them.
Buildings on top of the Ramp snap to a grid, making it easier to line them up with each other.
Size: 8m x 2m

Desc_Ramp_8x4_01_C.name: Ramp (4m)
Desc_Ramp_8x4_01_C.description:
Snaps to Foundations and makes it easier to get onto them.
Buildings on top of the Ramp snap to a grid, making it easier to line them up with each other.
Size: 8m x 4m

Desc_Ramp_8x4_Inverted_01_C.name: Inverted Ramp (4m)
Desc_Ramp_8x4_Inverted_01_C.description:
Provides a flat floor to build your factory on.
Buildings on top of the Foundation snap to a grid, making it easier to line them up with each other.
Size: 8m x 4m

Desc_Ramp_8x8x8_C.name: Double Ramp (8m)
Desc_Ramp_8x8x8_C.description:
Snaps to Foundations and makes it easier to get onto them.
Buildings on top of the Ramp snap to a grid, making it easier to line them up with each other.
Size: 8m x 8m

Desc_Ramp_Diagonal_8x1_01_C.name: Down Corner Ramp (1m)
Desc_Ramp_Diagonal_8x1_01_C.description:
Snaps to Foundations and makes it easier to get onto them.
Buildings on top of the Ramp snap to a grid, making it easier to line them up with each other.
Size: 8m x 1m

Desc_Ramp_Diagonal_8x1_02_C.name: Up Corner Ramp (1m)
Desc_Ramp_Diagonal_8x1_02_C.description:
Snaps to Foundations and makes it easier to get onto them.
Buildings on top of the Ramp snap to a grid, making it easier to line them up with each other.
Size: 8m x 1m

Desc_Ramp_Diagonal_8x2_01_C.description:

Desc_AlienPowerBuilding_C.name: Alien Power Augmenter
Desc_AlienPowerBuilding_C.description:
Generates power based on the total amount of power on the attached power grid.
This experimental technology is somehow able to extract power from the Somersloop by blasting it with energy.
Desc_AlienPowerBuilding_C.unlockedBy: [[Alien Technology Research|MAM Alien Technology Research]] - Power Augmenter

Desc_CentralStorage_C.name: Dimensional Depot Uploader
Desc_CentralStorage_C.description:
The Dimensional Depot Uploader is used to upload resources to a dimensional storage deposit.
From here resources can be used by the Build Gun and Crafting Stations, as if they were in the pioneer Inventory.
Desc_CentralStorage_C.unlockedBy: [[Alien Technology Research|MAM Alien Technology Research]] - Dimensional Depot

Desc_GeneratorGeoThermal_C.name: Geothermal Generator
Desc_GeneratorGeoThermal_C.description:
Harnesses geothermal energy to generate power. Must be built on a Geyser.
Caution: Power production fluctuates.
Power Production:
Impure Geyser: 50-150 MW (100 MW average)
Normal Geyser: 100-300 MW (200 MW average)
Pure Geyser: 200-600 MW (400 MW average)

Desc_ConveyorAttachmentSplitterProgramma.name: Programmable Splitter
Desc_ConveyorAttachmentSplitterProgramma.description:
Splits one Conveyor Belt into two or three.
Multiple filters can be set for each output to allow specific parts to pass through.

Desc_PowerPoleMk3_C.name: Power Pole Mk.3
Desc_PowerPoleMk3_C.description:
Allows for up to 10 Power Line connections.
Connect Power Poles, Power Generators, and factory buildings with Power Lines to create a power grid. The power grid supplies all connected buildings with power.
Desc_PowerPoleMk3_C.unlockedBy: [[Caterium Research|MAM Caterium Research]] - Power Poles Mk.3

Desc_PriorityPowerSwitch_C.name: Priority Power Switch
Desc_PriorityPowerSwitch_C.description: Priority Power Switches can be ranked by priority. When power production is too low, Switches will start turning off automatically until the power stabilizes, starting with Priority Group 8.
Desc_PriorityPowerSwitch_C.unlockedBy: [[Caterium Research|MAM Caterium Research]] - Priority Power Switch

Desc_PowerPoleMk2_C.name: Power Pole Mk.2
Desc_PowerPoleMk2_C.description:
Allows for up to 7 Power Line connections.
Connect Power Poles, Power Generators, and factory buildings with Power Lines to create a power grid. The power grid supplies all connected buildings with power.
Desc_PowerPoleMk2_C.unlockedBy: [[Caterium Research|MAM Caterium Research]] - Power Poles Mk.2

Desc_PowerSwitch_C.name: Power Switch
Desc_PowerSwitch_C.description:
Enables/disables the connection between 2 power grids when switched ON/OFF.
Note the A and B connector labels.

Desc_ConveyorAttachmentSplitterSmart_C.name: Smart Splitter
Desc_ConveyorAttachmentSplitterSmart_C.description:
Splits one Conveyor Belt into two or three.
A filter can be set for each output to allow a specific part to pass through.

Desc_ConveyorAttachmentMergerPriority_C.name: Priority Merger
Desc_ConveyorAttachmentMergerPriority_C.description:
Merges up to three Conveyor Belts into one.
Inputs can be prioritized to always be merged before others.
Desc_ConveyorAttachmentMergerPriority_C.unlockedBy: [[Quartz Research|MAM Quartz Research]] - Material Resonance Screening

Desc_RadarTower_C.name: Radar Tower
Desc_RadarTower_C.description:
Scans the surrounding area to display additional information on the Map.
Information revealed on the Map includes:
- Resource node locations
- Terrain data

Desc_ElevatorFloorStop_C.description: Attaches to a Personnel Elevator to add an additional floor stop and power connection.

Desc_Elevator_C.name: Personnel Elevator
Desc_Elevator_C.description:
Transports FICSIT personnel between floors while meeting acceptable standards for efficiency and safety.
Consumes power when in use and transports power between all attached Elevator Floor Stops.
NOTE: Additional floor stops can be added with an Elevator Floor Stop.

Desc_PipelineMK2_NoIndicator_C.name: Clean Pipeline Mk.2
Desc_PipelineMK2_NoIndicator_C.description:

Capacity: 600m³ of fluid per minute.
Caution: This version of the Pipeline does not feature an external indicator.

Desc_Pipeline_NoIndicator_C.name: Clean Pipeline Mk.1
Desc_Pipeline_NoIndicator_C.description:

Capacity: 300m³ of fluid per minute.
Caution: This version of the Pipeline does not feature an external indicator.

Desc_LightsControlPanel_C.name: Light Control Panel
Desc_LightsControlPanel_C.description:
Sections off a series of lights, allowing them to be adjusted as a group.
Controls all lights connected to the power grid via the Light Connector (yellow label).
Note: Other Control Panels and Power Switches interrupt the connection.

Desc_Beam_Connector_C.description: Hides seams and makes Beam connections more visually pleasing.

Desc_Beam_Connector_Double_C.name: Double Beam Connector
Desc_Beam_Connector_Double_C.description: Hides seams and makes Beam connections more visually pleasing.

Desc_Beam_Support_C.name: Beam Support
Desc_Beam_Support_C.description:
Snaps to Beams and various other structural buildings.
Used to aesthetically connect beams to surfaces.

Desc_GeneratorBiomass_Automated_C.name: Biomass Burner
Desc_GeneratorBiomass_Automated_C.description:
Burns various forms of Biomass to generate electricity for the power grid.
Has a Conveyor Belt input port that allows the Biomass supply to be automated.
Resource consumption will automatically be lowered to meet power demands.

Desc_SpaceElevator_C.name: Space Elevator
Desc_SpaceElevator_C.description:
Requires deliveries of special Project Parts to complete Project Assembly Phases.
Completing these Phases will unlock new Tiers in the HUB Terminal.

Desc_MinerMk1_C.name: Miner Mk.1
Desc_MinerMk1_C.description:
Extracts solid resources from the resource node it is built on.
Default extraction rate is 60 resources per minute.
Extraction rate varies based on resource node purity. Outputs all extracted resources onto connected Conveyor Belts.

Desc_StorageContainerMk1_C.name: Storage Container
Desc_StorageContainerMk1_C.description:
Contains 24 slots for storing large amounts of items.
Has 1 Conveyor Belt input port and 1 Conveyor Belt output port.

Desc_ConstructorMk1_C.name: Constructor
Desc_ConstructorMk1_C.description:
Crafts 1 part into another part.
Can be automated by feeding component parts in via a Conveyor Belt connected to the input port. The resulting parts can be automatically extracted by connecting a Conveyor Belt to the output port.

Desc_SmelterMk1_C.name: Smelter
Desc_SmelterMk1_C.description:
Smelts ore into ingots.
Can be automated by feeding ore in via a Conveyor Belt connected to the input port. The resulting ingots can be automatically extracted by connecting a Conveyor Belt to the output port.

Desc_DroneTransport_C.name: Drone
Desc_DroneTransport_C.description:
Transports available input back and forth between its home Port and destination Ports. Drone Status and other details can be viewed at a Drone's home Port.
Must be built on a Drone Port.
Has 9 inventory slots.
Can use any fuel type.
Refuels at any of its connected Ports if possible.

Desc_FreightWagon_C.name: Freight Car
Desc_FreightWagon_C.description:
Attaches to an Electric Locomotive or other Freight Car to transport resources. Must be built on a Railway.
Resources are loaded and unloaded at Freight Platforms.
Has a 1600m³ or 32-slot capacity, depending on whether resources are liquid or solid.

Desc_Locomotive_C.name: Electric Locomotive
Desc_Locomotive_C.description:
Moves Freight Cars from station to station.
Requires between 25-110 MW of power to move.
Must be built on a Railway.
Nicknamed 'Leif' by FICSIT pioneers because of its reliability.

Desc_Truck_C.name: Truck
Desc_Truck_C.description:
Picks up and delivers resources at Truck Stations. This process can be automated. Nicknamed 'The Unit' by FICSIT pioneers because of its massive frame.
Has 48 inventory slots and a built-in Crafting Bench.
Fuel: Any fuel type

Desc_Tractor_C.name: Tractor
Desc_Tractor_C.description:
Picks up and delivers resources at Truck Stations. This process can be automated. Nicknamed 'Sugarcube' by FICSIT pioneers with the justification “It’s pretty sweet, y’know”.
Has 25 inventory slots and a built-in Crafting Bench.
Fuel: Any fuel type

Desc_Explorer_C.name: Explorer
Desc_Explorer_C.description:
Traverses rough terrain, including near-vertical surfaces. A fast and nimble exploration vehicle.
Has 12 inventory slots and a built-in Crafting Bench.
Fuel: Any fuel type
